name_cn:
Size 21*16*7cm
White checkered! Unlock the latest LV Deauville camera bag! Official price 14700, and currently out of stock! I can tell you this bag looks even better in person than in photos. It's lightweight and very practical! The moment you hold it, you'll know I'm telling the truth! I guarantee this is genuine merchandise sold at this price, and we are sourcing directly from the counter!
